div.div: The native Trial Balance above is the primary source for audit overrides. Use these tools only for manual account additions or resetting edited lines.

field.name: portal_account_no
field.invisible: company_free_zone != 'Dubai Multi Commodities Centre Free Zone'
field.required: company_free_zone == 'Dubai Multi Commodities Centre Free Zone'

separator.string: HTML source is intentionally hidden in this form for faster loading.
Use Visual Editor to edit content or Preview to inspect the rendered report.
